name: journal-assistant-workflows
description: Repo-local Codex workflows for Journal Assistant frontend work, UI polish, and full-stack coordination.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-aware Codex workflows for frontend implementation, UI polish, and cross-stack work
interface.longDescription: Use Journal Assistant Workflows for this repo's Next.js frontend, calm editorial UI system, FastAPI backend, and cross-stack product changes with GCP as the preferred backend cloud direction.
defaultPrompt: Route this Journal Assistant task to the right frontend or backend workflow
Implement a new frontend screen using the repo's MVVM structure
Polish this UI while keeping the editorial design system consistent
